name: quioteframework/auth-oauth
description: OAuth 2.1 client (auth-code + PKCE, OIDC discovery, ID-token validation) and Client Credentials (M2M) support for Quiote.

extra.quiote-monorepo-note: Developed in-tree under quioteframework/quiote's packages/auth-oauth/; split to this standalone repo via splitsh/lite on tag push. PRs go to the monorepo, not here.
